import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { TAGS } from '../data'; import { Avatar, Stars } from '../components/UI'; const REVIEWS = [ { name: 'Rachel M.', text: 'Marcus fixed my fence in under 2 hours. Showed up on time, professional, and cleaned up after himself!', service: 'Fence Repair', before: '🌿', after: '✨' }, { name: 'Tyler B.', text: 'Sofia tutored my son for his SAT. He went from 1100 to 1320 in 6 weeks. Absolutely incredible!', service: 'SAT Tutoring', before: '📚', after: '🎓' }, { name: 'Linda K.', text: 'Aria deep cleaned my house before I listed it. Got $15k over asking price. Coincidence? I think not.', service: 'Deep Cleaning', before: '🏠', after: '💎' }, ]; export default function LandingPage({ setPage, providers, bookings, onBook }) { const [search, setSearch] = useState(''); const activeProviders = providers.filter(p => p.available); const filtered = search ? activeProviders.filter(p => p.skills.some(s => s.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase())) || p.name.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()) ) : activeProviders; const totalCompleted = bookings.filter(b => b.status === 'Completed').length; return (
{/* ---- HERO ---- */}
{activeProviders.length} providers available now

Get anything done.
Locally. Instantly.

Connect with skilled neighbors who can help with anything — from fixing a faucet to teaching guitar.

{[['500+', 'Tasks Posted'], [totalCompleted + '', 'Jobs Completed'], ['4.9 ★', 'Avg Rating']].map(([v, l]) => (
{v}
{l}
))}
{/* ---- SEARCH & PROVIDERS ---- */}

Find a Provider

Search by skill, service type, or name

🔍 setSearch(e.target.value)} style={{ paddingLeft: 44 }} />
{!search && (
{TAGS.slice(0, 14).map(t => ( setSearch(t)}>{t} ))}
)} {filtered.length === 0 ? (
🔍

No providers found for "{search}"

No one offers this yet — but you can post an open request!

) : (
{filtered.map(p => (
{p.name}
{p.reviews} reviews · {p.jobs} jobs
● Open

{p.bio}

{p.skills.map(s => {s})}
📍 {p.zip}
))}
)}
{/* ---- TRUST / REVIEWS ---- */}

Trusted by your neighbors

Real reviews from real customers

{REVIEWS.map((r, i) => (
{[1,2,3,4,5].map(s => ★)}

{r.text}

— {r.name} · {r.service}
{r.before}
→
{r.after}
))}
{/* ---- HOW IT WORKS ---- */}

How Volunteer works

Four simple steps to get help with anything

{[ ['🔍', 'Search', 'Describe what you need or browse providers by skill'], ['📅', 'Book', 'Pick a date and time that works for you'], ['✅', 'Done', 'Your provider shows up and handles it'], ['⭐', 'Review', 'Rate your experience and help the community'], ].map(([icon, title, desc], i) => (
{icon}

{title}

{desc}

))}
); }
